name: Lawrence Culp, Jr.
background: Mr. Culp has served as Chairman and CEO of GE since October 2018. He is also the CEO of GE Aerospace. Prior to joining GE, he served as President and CEO of Danaher Corporation from 2001 to 2014.

commpanies.name: General Electric Company
commpanies.title_or_role: Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, CEO, GE Aerospace
